name: Maple Syrup Rum Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fat and lean salt pork, sliced
1 cup maple or light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Cover the beans with 12 cups cold water. Let soak overnight.
3. In the morning, pour the beans and their soaking water into a large saucepan. Add 1 teaspoon baking soda and more cold water if necessary to cover the beans. Bring to a boil, uncovered.
4. Boil until some of the skins come off when you blow on the beans.
5. Line a bean pot with the sliced pork, then pour in the beans and their water.
6. Roll the onion in the dry mustard until all of the mustard sticks to it. Place the onion in the middle of the beans.
7. Pour the maple syrup and coarse salt over the beans.
8. Bake for 4-5 hours in the preheated oven.
9. In the last hour of cooking, cover the beans with whole apples, placed as close together as possible.
10. Cream together the sugar and butter, then spread the mixture on top of the apples.
11. Pour the rum on top just before serving.
